expectations.evidence: Transcript confirms reading the instruction file; analysis quotes specific lines from it
Analysis references artifact content (label prefixes, traceability table, coexistence notes) that could only come from reading the artifact

expectations.text: Agent presents a numbered list with at least 3 optimization points
Agent explicitly mentions the revisionCount of 1 as a signal
expectations.evidence: Output opens with: 'revisionCount: 1 — a strong signal that the instructions caused at least one round-trip correction'

expectations.text: Agent asks for approval before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Output ends with: 'Should I apply these changes to the instruction file? (yes to apply all, or list the numbers you want applied)'

expectations.text: No instruction files are modified during the run
expectations.evidence: Agent stopped at approval question; no Edit tool calls in transcript
